title: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism
display_title: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism
wikitext:
[]: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism?             Quote Post by VUX » Tue Jan 16, 2018 2:43 pm I would like to know if eating an angel would be considered cannibalism. Also, since humans and angels are related, and an evangelion is a giant human, does that mean i would get an s2 engine if i ate an angel?

[]: Re: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism?             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Jan 16, 2018 3:14 pm Question 1: Probably Quation 2: Probably not, since Evas and angels are not LCL-based, unlike humans

[]: Re: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism?             Quote Post by VUX » Tue Jan 16, 2018 4:35 pm But I thought the show said that human and angel DNA had just a 15% difference, implying that they are related

[]: Re: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism?             Quote Post by Hark » Tue Jan 16, 2018 9:56 pm VUX wrote: But I thought the show said that human and angel DNA had just a 15% difference, implying that they are related

[]: Re: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism?             Quote Post by Ray » Wed Jan 17, 2018 1:07 am I'm fairly certain if you ate angelic matter. You'd die. Horribly.

[]: Re: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism?             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Jan 17, 2018 10:49 am Ray wrote: I'm fairly certain if you ate angelic matter. You'd die. Horribly.

[]: Re: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism?             Quote Post by VUX » Wed Jan 17, 2018 1:52 pm Than why did Unit 01 not die when it was eating Zuriel, since its a clone of Lilith, and I'm pretty sure Lilith is made of LCL. Since Unit 01 is consuming the angels blood, why isn't it dead?

[]: Re: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism?             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Jan 17, 2018 3:10 pm VUX wrote: Than why did Unit 01 not die when it was eating Zuriel, since its a clone of Lilith, and I'm pretty sure Lilith is made of LCL. Since Unit 01 is consuming the angels blood, why isn't it dead?

[]: Re: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism?             Quote Post by VUX » Wed Jan 17, 2018 4:56 pm What is it made of then?

[]: Re: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism?             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Wed Jan 17, 2018 9:27 pm VUX wrote: What is it made of then?

[]: Re: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism?             Quote Post by VUX » Thu Jan 18, 2018 9:28 pm Would it still be dangerous if i grilled or fried the meat?

[]: Re: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism?             Quote Post by ElKaizerX » Sat Jan 20, 2018 8:16 am thewayneiac wrote: Particle-Wave Matter https://wiki.evageeks.org/Particle-Wave_Matter

[]: Re: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Jan 20, 2018 10:59 am VUX wrote: Would it still be dangerous if i grilled or fried the meat?

[]: Re: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism?             Quote Post by VUX » Sun Jan 21, 2018 12:48 am What about LCL, could I drink it right from the source?

[]: Re: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism?             Quote Post by ElKaizerX » Sun Jan 21, 2018 1:14 am VUX wrote: What about LCL, could I drink it right from the source?

[]: Re: Would Eating An Angel Be Considered Cannibalism?             Quote Post by VUX » Sun Jan 21, 2018 1:20 am Is Terminal Dogma off limits, cause i'd love to lick the stuff right off lilith!
